incidents.title: Build & Test failed on main
incidents.rootCause: Cannot find module '@nestjs/config' or its corresponding type declarations.
incidents.resolution: Run npm install @nestjs/config --save and push package.json and package-lock.json changes.

incidents.title: Docker Build failed on master
incidents.rootCause: Dockerfile references base image golang:1.21-alpine which failed to pull due to registry rate limit.
incidents.resolution: Configure registry auth credentials or switch to a local public-mirror base image.

incidents.title: Deploy Staging failed on main
incidents.rootCause: Database connection string env var DATABASE_URL is not set or empty during server startup.
incidents.resolution: Add the DATABASE_URL environment variable to the staging environment configuration in AWS Parameter Store.

incidents.title: CI Pipeline failed on main

aiDiagnosis.rootCause: Mock diagnosis: A simulated error pattern was detected in the logs.
aiDiagnosis.resolution: Check dependencies in package.json and ensure all modules are properly installed using 'npm install'.

incidents.rootCause: Mock diagnosis: A simulated error pattern was detected in the logs.
incidents.resolution: Check dependencies in package.json and ensure all modules are properly installed using 'npm install'.

knowledge.title: Python CI failed on feature/buggy-calculator
knowledge.rootCause: No logs available to diagnose the issue, unable to determine the root cause of the CI/CD failure
knowledge.resolution: Check the CI/CD pipeline configuration to ensure logging is enabled, then re-run the pipeline to generate logs for further diagnosis

knowledge.title: Python CI failed on feature/buggy-calculator
knowledge.rootCause: The calculator.py script contains a syntax error, specifically a missing colon at the end of the function definition for 'divide'.
knowledge.resolution: 1. Open the calculator.py script. 2. Locate the 'divide' function definition. 3. Add a colon at the end of the function definition line.

knowledge.title: CompileError: Cannot find module '@aiops/types'
knowledge.rootCause: TypeScript path alias mismatch for @aiops/types in tsconfig.json
knowledge.resolution: Update paths in apps/backend/tsconfig.json to point to pre-built dist output instead of source directory

knowledge.title: Python CI failed on test/logic-error
knowledge.rootCause: The calculator.py script is attempting to add a negative number, which is not allowed by the add function's assertion that inputs must be non-negative.
knowledge.resolution: Update the calculator.py script to handle negative numbers, either by removing the assertion or by adding error checking to handle negative inputs. For example, you could add a check at the beginning of the add function to raise an error if either input is negative.
